matched_to: tour operators and travel advisors specializing in wine tourism, gastronomy, and cultural travel in Spain

leads.title: Founder & CEO
leads.headline: Founder & CEO at Food N' Wine Vacations — designing tours that combine must-see sites with a real taste of local life in Italy, France, Spain, Portugal, Greece, Slovenia, Croatia
leads.company_address: 4514 Chamblee Dunwoody Rd, Suite 293, Atlanta, GA 30338, US
leads.company_description: Food N' Wine Vacations is a US-based tour operator specializing in culinary vacations and wine tours in Italy, France, and Spain. They design and operate their own small-group tours led by local guides, featuring experiences and places you wouldn't find in a guidebook.

leads.title: President
leads.headline: President at Tour de Forks
leads.company_address: 12 East 86th Street, New York, New York, US
leads.company_description: Tour de Forks is a New York-based boutique tour operator specializing in immersive culinary adventures inspired by the Slow Food movement. They design small-group escorted tours, bespoke group travel, and FITs with hands-on cooking classes, market visits, and expert-guided dining across Spain (Basque Country, Barcelona), Italy, and France.

leads.title: Product and Business Development Manager
leads.headline: Product And Business Development Manager, Grape Escapes Ltd
leads.company_address: 27c High Street, Ware, Hertfordshire, United Kingdom
leads.company_description: Grape Escapes is a UK-based specialist tour operator focused exclusively on wine tourism, founded in 2004. They offer tailor-made luxury wine tours, guided trips, self-drive circuits, and tasting weekends across select wine regions including Spain's Rioja.

leads.title: Manager of Luxury Travel & Agent Liaison
leads.headline: Manager of Luxury Travel & Agent Liaison at Sagres Vacations
leads.company_address: 761 Bedford Street, Fall River, MA 02723, US
leads.company_description: Sagres Vacations is a US-based destination specialist for Portugal and Spain, offering behind-the-scenes access to authentic cultural experiences. Their itineraries include private wine tastings at historic estates, culinary workshops with local chefs, and overnight stays at castles and national landmarks.

leads.title: Co-Founder & Owner
leads.headline: Co-Founder & Owner at Stirred Travel
leads.company_address: Tenter Close, York, North Yorkshire, United Kingdom
leads.company_description: Stirred Travel is a UK-based culinary travel company that combines vacation experiences with mastering the art of cooking. Born from a shared passion for superb food, wines, and authentic experiences, they offer immersive gastronomic journeys for food enthusiasts.

leads.title: Founder Director
leads.headline: Founder Director at Caspin Journeys Ltd
leads.company_address: 65 Randall Road, Kenilworth, Warwickshire, United Kingdom
leads.company_description: Caspin Journeys is a UK-based family-run tour operator founded in 1992, specializing in small group walking tours in Italy, England, and Spain. Their immersive tours blend active exploration on foot with culture, history, gourmet food, and wine experiences for like-minded travelers.

leads.title: Owner
leads.headline: I help food, wine and whiskey lovers design and curate amazing gastro travel experiences
leads.company_description: Catching the Sun is a US-based boutique travel advisory specializing in gastro travel for food, wine, and whiskey lovers. They curate exclusive culinary experiences and behind-the-scenes access for travelers seeking authentic food and drink destinations worldwide.

leads.title: President
leads.headline: President at aliveXperiences
leads.company_description: aliveXperiences is a US-based boutique tour operator working exclusively with travel professionals, providing white-label tailored itineraries and on-site concierge support across Europe. Their offerings include curated culinary and wine experiences, private guides, exclusive venue access, and bespoke events.

leads.title: Tour Programme Manager
leads.headline: Tour Programme Manager at ACE Cultural Tours
leads.company_address: Stapleford Granary, Bury Road, Stapleford, Cambridgeshire CB22 5BP, GB
leads.company_description: ACE Cultural Tours is the UK's oldest cultural holiday operator, established in 1958. They specialize in expert-led study tours focused on art, history, natural history, wine, and gastronomy across Europe and beyond.

leads.title: Owner
leads.headline: Owner — Verified Travel Advisor at Wandering Puffin
leads.company_address: 1730 New Brighton Blvd #119, Minneapolis, MN 55413, US
leads.company_description: Wandering Puffin is a US-based boutique travel agency specializing in bespoke European adventures with over 30 years of expertise. They craft personalized independent trips emphasizing authentic culture, cuisine, and off-the-beaten-path experiences across Spain, Portugal, Italy, and beyond.
